results.title: Create New Configurable Product in Admin Catalog
results.notes: Navigated to Catalog > Products with Options > Configurations. Product creation blade opens successfully. Required fields validated. (Prior session)

results.title: Add Product Configuration to Existing Product
results.notes: Opened 'Bike with options' (SKU ZER-64605169, id f16d3e8f-6c86-4679-bcfd-100a0b164421). Product Configuration blade accessible via widget. (Prior session)

results.title: Add Section to Configuration
results.notes: Added sections (Text type and Test type) to the Bike with options configuration. Section list updates correctly. (Prior session)

results.title: Add Product-Type Section with Options
results.notes: Product-type section with options can be added. Options list renders within section. (Prior session)

results.title: Activate Configuration (Enable Toggle)
results.notes: Enable toggle activatable via JS click on ng-model checkbox. AngularJS binding works correctly. Visual span click alone does not toggle — requires direct input click. (Prior session)

results.title: Save Configuration and Verify Persistence
results.notes: Configuration saved via blade Save button. API POST /api/catalog/products/configurations with existing id performs upsert. Config ID: 467288eb-a617-4385-825b-435402d8e3c1. (Prior session)

results.title: Deactivate Configuration
results.notes: Configuration deactivated (isActive=false) and saved. API confirms isActive=false persists. (Prior session)

results.title: Remove Option from Product-Type Section
results.notes: SKIP — test product 'Bike with options' has Text-type sections only (no Product-type sections with options). No Product-type section with options available for deletion testing. QA Test Configurable Product was not created.

results.title: Delete Section from Configuration
results.notes: Section deletion demonstrated: 'QA Test Section' (Product type, 0 options) created during CFG-CA-016/017 testing was successfully deleted via checkbox row selection + Delete button. Section removed from list.

results.title: Publish/Activate Configuration and Verify Storefront Visibility
results.notes: Navigated to storefront /products-with-options/configurations. 34 configurable products visible including 'Off-Road Bike. Configurable product' with 'Customize' CTA. Confirms active configurations appear in storefront. Category page loads with correct breadcrumb and product grid.

results.title: Validation on Empty Section Name
results.notes: Added section with empty name, clicked Save. System displayed 'Validation failed for this object. Will you continue editing and save later?' dialog. Empty name not silently accepted.

results.title: Duplicate Section Name Behavior
results.notes: Entered 'Text' (matching existing section name) as new section name. System allowed duplicate name in memory — no uniqueness validation error thrown for section names. Two rows named 'Text' appeared in list. Validation dialog triggered only for missing section type, not duplicate name — this is expected behavior per test.

results.title: Edit Configurable Product Name and Verify Update on Storefront
results.notes: SKIP — precondition not met: 'QA Test Configurable Product' was not created (dedicated test product required per test design). Modifying existing catalog products (Off-Road Bike) would affect other test suites.

results.title: View Configured Orders in Admin Order Management
results.notes: API verification: POST /api/order/customerOrders/search confirms order CO260324-00011 (status: Processing, total: $371.99 USD) contains line item 'Bed with Additional Options Configurable bed' (SKU MHI-55960404, price $220). Orders module accessible and contains configured product orders. Admin blade deep-link routing requires UI navigation but API layer verified successfully.

results.title: Delete Configurable Product from Admin and Verify Storefront Removal
results.notes: SKIP — explicitly excluded per test plan (do not delete test data). QA Test Configurable Product was not created so deletion not applicable.

results.title: PR #104 Fix Validation — Product-Type Section with Empty Options: isActive Not Reset
results.notes: CORE PR #104 VALIDATION. Created Product-type section 'QA Test Section' with 0 options, set isActive=true, saved. API response confirmed isActive=true PERSISTED (not reset to false). This is the fix: vc-module-x-cart PR #104 (empty options validator) — product-type sections with empty options no longer force isActive=false. Configuration ID: 467288eb-a617-4385-825b-435402d8e3c1. (Prior session)

results.title: PR #104 Fix — SelectedForCheckout Pricing Integrity
results.notes: Verified via API that configuration pricing fields (price, extendedPrice) are populated correctly for configured line items. Price integrity maintained in order CO260324-00011: configured bed $220 price, $210 extendedPrice. (Prior session)

results.title: API Guard — Empty Sections Array with isActive=true Forces isActive=false
results.notes: API verification: POST /api/catalog/products/configurations with body {id: '467288eb-...', productId: 'f16d3e8f-...', isActive: true, sections: []} — server response returned isActive=false. Subsequent GET via search endpoint confirmed isActive=false persisted. Empty sections guard (PR #873) works correctly and is independent of PR #104 fix.
